message:
refactor(html_export): convert tool calls from expandable details to compact badges

Replace the expandable <details> element pattern for tool calls with
compact badge elements that show a hover popover. This significantly
reduces visual noise in exported HTML while maintaining access to
tool call details.

Key changes:
- renderer.rs: Convert tool call rendering from details/summary to
  compact span badges with popover content
- Add ToolStatus::label() method for accessibility attributes
- Truncate input/output to 500 chars for popover display
- Simplify tool icon/status rendering pipeline

styles.rs: Expected complementary CSS changes for new badge styles

lib.rs: Related module coordination

Also add session_export.html to .gitignore as an ephemeral test artifact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
